response.global_analysis: The audio is a high-energy vocal performance followed by an enthusiastic studio dialogue. The song 'Private EyeZ' matches the reference lyrics provided but includes additional verses. I have transcribed the full audio duration, ensuring timestamps are tightly synchronized with the vocal bursts and splitting lines for readability and audio pauses. Translations are context-aware, reflecting the characters' personas and the celebratory nature of the 4th-anniversary event.

subtitles.original: 変化カモフラージュ迷彩カメレオン
subtitles.english: Transformation, camouflage, stealthy chameleon

subtitles.original: 中二病アイシャドウ甘いチョコレート
subtitles.english: Chuunibyou eyeshadow, sweet chocolate

subtitles.original: エッフェル塔段差を蹴るサイズ
subtitles.english: Eiffel Tower size that kicks through the gaps

subtitles.original: 夢のためにメラメラ
subtitles.english: Burning bright for our dreams

subtitles.original: 闇を燃やせメラメラ
subtitles.english: Burn through the darkness, blazing hot

subtitles.original: どんな時もこの声を届けたい
subtitles.english: No matter when, I want this voice to reach you

subtitles.original: 崖っぷちでメラメラ
subtitles.english: Blazing on the edge of a cliff

subtitles.original: 諦めるには早いわ
subtitles.english: It's too early to give up

subtitles.original: 恩返し 奇跡の おまじない
subtitles.english: A miracle spell to return the favor

subtitles.original: まさに見せ括弧 参勤交代 天然記念
subtitles.english: A true display, a grand procession, a natural treasure

subtitles.original: 初陣意外 場外 だってお真面目
subtitles.english: Unexpected debut, even out of bounds, so serious

subtitles.original: どこにいたって迷子になってもバンプ
subtitles.english: No matter where you are or if you're lost, just bump

subtitles.original: 有象無象でも無理巻いて
subtitles.english: Winding through the masses, pushing ahead

subtitles.original: 電光石火 エスケープ
subtitles.english: Lightning-fast escape

subtitles.original: 君のためにメラメラ
subtitles.english: Burning bright for you

subtitles.original: 愛を燃やせメラメラ
subtitles.english: Burn with love, blazing hot

subtitles.original: 守り抜くと誓ったあの日から
subtitles.english: Since that day I vowed to protect everything

subtitles.original: 明日のためにメラメラ
subtitles.english: Burning bright for tomorrow

subtitles.original: この音に乗ってメラメラ
subtitles.english: Riding this sound, blazing hot

subtitles.original: 退屈なんて無縁でしょ さようなら
subtitles.english: Boredom is a stranger to us, so farewell

subtitles.original: 超常現象 tenderness
subtitles.english: Supernatural phenomenon, tenderness

subtitles.original: 行くぜ東奔西走 timeless
subtitles.english: Let's go, running east and west, timeless

subtitles.original: 捨てろ劣等感 ほら最強じゃん
subtitles.english: Discard your inferiority complex, look, we're the strongest

subtitles.original: 今 焼き付けろ
subtitles.english: Burn it into your memory now

subtitles.original: 超常現象 tenderness
subtitles.english: Supernatural phenomenon, tenderness

subtitles.original: 行くぜ東奔西走 timeless
subtitles.english: Let's go, running east and west, timeless

subtitles.original: 我等名探偵？いや迷探偵
subtitles.english: Are we great detectives? No, muddled detectives

subtitles.original: さぁ ba-ba-ba-ba-bang
subtitles.english: Now, ba-ba-ba-ba-bang

subtitles.original: ねぇ、ねぇ、ねぇ、ルイさーん！
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, hey, Lui-san!

subtitles.original: めっちゃよかったね！
subtitles.english: It was so good!

subtitles.original: めっちゃよかった、めっちゃ楽しいね！
subtitles.english: It was great, so much fun!

subtitles.original: マジかっこいい！
subtitles.english: That was seriously cool!

subtitles.original: まだ終わってないから！これからも最高だよ！
subtitles.english: It's not over yet! It's going to be the best from here!

subtitles.original: なーにこれ？
subtitles.english: What's this?

subtitles.original: 気づいちゃいました？待ってました！
subtitles.english: Did you notice? I've been waiting for this!

subtitles.original: これ変じゃない？めっちゃかっこいいじゃん、こよが作りました！
subtitles.english: Isn't this weird? It's so cool, Koyori made it!

subtitles.original: また経費使ったんか？
subtitles.english: Did you use the budget again?

subtitles.original: これがござるの給料８ヶ月分の…いやいやいや！
subtitles.english: This is 8 months of my salary... No, no, no!

subtitles.original: ということで、これは告知用カードを…
subtitles.english: Anyway, these are announcement cards...

subtitles.original: 告知！ということでこの流れでね、グッズ紹介でございますね！
subtitles.english: Announcement! So, moving on, it's time for merchandise introduction!

subtitles.original: はい、ホロックス活動４周年記念グッズ！
subtitles.english: Yes, holoX 4th Anniversary Commemorative Goods!

subtitles.original: 『Anniversary Parade』今日の18時より販売開始されております！
subtitles.english: 'Anniversary Parade' sales have started from 18:00 today!

subtitles.original: プレミアムアクリル色紙！
subtitles.english: Premium Acrylic Shikishi!

subtitles.original: 複製サインとロゴが箔押しになっててめっちゃいい感じ！
subtitles.english: The replica signature and logo are foil-stamped, it looks great!

subtitles.original: ホロカスリーブ！
subtitles.english: Holocasu Sleeves!

subtitles.original: こちらなんと60枚入り！
subtitles.english: This one actually contains 60 sleeves!

subtitles.original: アクリルスタンド！
subtitles.english: Acrylic Stands!

subtitles.original: キービジュアルのデザインの表情違いになってるんで、ぜひ！
subtitles.english: The expressions are different from the key visual, so please check them out!

subtitles.original: 記念メダル！
subtitles.english: Commemorative Medal!

subtitles.original: ケースと巾着がついてくる記念メダルでございます！
subtitles.english: It's a commemorative medal that comes with a case and a drawstring bag!

subtitles.original: こちらね、期生ごとにデザインが異なっておりますので…
subtitles.english: The design differs for each generation, so...

subtitles.original: 次のカードはなーにかな？オープン！
subtitles.english: What's the next card? Open!

subtitles.original: タイミーコラボ！
subtitles.english: Timee Collaboration!

subtitles.original: 先日タイミーで募集したレアバイトなんですけど…
subtitles.english: Regarding the rare part-time jobs we recruited for on Timee recently...

subtitles.original: 現地の様子があるということで、見てみましょう！
subtitles.english: We have footage from the site, so let's take a look!

subtitles.original: すごーい！ホロックスしてる！
subtitles.english: Amazing! They're totally holoX!

subtitles.original: ありがとみんな！他にもありますよ、ドン！
subtitles.english: Thank you everyone! There's more, look!
